text: Here I am, surrounded by glass, light, and the language of innovation. The cool tones and technological displays evoke curiosity but also a hint of unease—the sensation of standing at the threshold of the unknown. The words on the wall speak to rapid change and blurry perception, echoing my own uncertainty in interpreting this high-tech, futuristic space. I feel both wonder and a tinge of displacement, as if I am wandering through the blurred intersection of past certainties and future potential.
